title: Sri Nandi Publications: Classification of Data Structures
description: A hierarchical flowchart illustrating the primary classifications of data structures as outlined by Sri Nandi Publications in Module 5.
relationships: Primitive structures are basic building blocks
Non-Primitive structures are derived from Primitive ones
Non-Primitive structures are divided into Linear and Non-Linear types
Linear structures include Arrays, Linked Lists, Stacks, Queues
Non-Linear structures include Trees and Graphs
Files are a separate category for permanent storage
